gold.title: Feature with Image Comparison
gold.reason: Full feature section wrapping a draggable image comparison slider with badge, heading, and description — production-ready marketing block for showcasing before/after product value.

gold.title: Comparison Table
gold.reason: Filterable, sortable comparison table using shadcn Table, Select, and Input — comprehensive feature-comparison section essential for SaaS pricing and competitor pages.

gold.title: Code Comparison
gold.reason: Side-by-side code snippet comparison with syntax highlighting — polished, production-grade component for developer tools and SaaS sites showing before/after code.

silver.title: Compare
silver.reason: Draggable image comparison slider — high-quality interactive component for showcasing product redesigns or AI output comparisons; effect-only but very polished.

silver.title: Image Comparison
silver.reason: Clean draggable image comparison with good UX — solid alternative to aceternity variant; well-suited for design portfolio and SaaS sites.

silver.title: Image Comparison
silver.reason: Another image comparison slider — functional and clean; third variant with minor differentiation.

silver.title: Table
silver.reason: Enhanced shadcn table with improved appearance — useful data presentation component; not a comparison tool per se but broadly applicable.

bronze.title: Lightning Split
bronze.reason: Lightning-bolt split visual effect — niche dramatic aesthetic; limited use cases beyond entertainment or gaming sites.

bronze.title: Assisted Password Confirmation
bronze.reason: Password match/mismatch UI with animation — app-specific form component; not a website section or comparison block suitable for general redesign.
